cautions: Guides can be community-authored; verify exact model/revision.
Do not treat teardown as electrical diagnosis unless evidence matches.
Manuals can cover multiple revisions; store document title, revision/date and page.
Vendor part listings are not manufacturer service manuals; cross-check FRU/part numbers.
Use only technical identifiers; ignore pricing/availability unless user asks current shopping advice.

use_for: old driver/source packages where legal and safe
cautions: Licensing and provenance vary; do not import copyrighted manuals verbatim.
